_comment: TAKEHARA VICTORY WATCHER — handed to the client from the Java win-hook after the Takehara gym battle and played once the Cobblemon battle GUI has closed (BATTLE_VICTORY fires while that GUI still owns the camera, so firing it there climbed UNSEEN — the 'doesn't climb after the battle' report; the client now holds it until getBattle()==null and bounces it back, so it plays exactly like /cutscene play). Camera path RECORDED IN-WORLD (/cutscene record, promoted 2026-07-23): opens low in the fight pit (~2061/142/2473), RISES up the shaft and TILTS DOWN to reveal the all-black watcher. TWO doubles (the `doubles` array): a PLAYER-skinned 'you' standing victorious on the arena floor at 2055.5/138/2473.5 (the engage-fn stage spot, facing north/yaw 180 toward where Leader Cicada floated), and the watcher figure at 2064/177/2474 (moved 2026-07-23 to the camera's actual line of sight — the old 2065.5/177/2481.5 was the stale offline estimate the re-record never updated). Both auto-swept afterward (cutscene-only clones, Tag ci_cutscene_double); the 'you' double additionally carries ci_cutscene_playerdouble so only IT gets the live-skin patch. Rule 7: never named — an ominous subtitle only. The 4th keyframe holds on the figure so the warden/enderman reveal beats land. No endBack/endCommand: the fight is already won, the scene just restores the player in place.
